title: Romantic Date Night
desc: The classic West Chester date night — cocktails, a world-class dinner, and a show.

steps.title: Cocktails at Bar Avalon
steps.desc: Start with craft cocktails in the stylish lounge. The seasonal menu always has something creative.

steps.title: Dinner at Andiario
steps.desc: West Chester's crown jewel — a New York Times 'Best Restaurant' with a seasonal tasting-style menu. Reservations essential.

steps.title: Show at Uptown Knauer
steps.desc: Catch a live performance — theater, music, or comedy — at the beautifully restored performing arts center.

title: Downtown Walking Tour
desc: Experience the best of downtown West Chester on foot. Coffee, shops, and a great lunch.

steps.title: Coffee at Roots Cafe
steps.desc: Start with a quality latte and a pastry at this cozy, health-conscious cafe.

steps.title: Browse Gay Street Shops
steps.desc: Walk Gay Street and pop into the boutiques, vintage shops, and local stores.

steps.title: Lunch at Carlino's
steps.desc: Italian market and deli with incredible sandwiches, prepared foods, and imported goods to take home.

steps.title: Chester County History Center
steps.desc: Wrap up with an hour exploring Chester County's fascinating history.

title: BYOB Night
desc: West Chester is famous for its BYOB restaurants. Grab a bottle and enjoy a no-corkage-fee dinner.

steps.title: Pick Up Wine
steps.desc: Stop by The Wine Merchant on Gay Street for a great bottle recommendation.

steps.title: Dinner at Limoncello
steps.desc: Upscale Italian BYOB with handmade pasta and a warm, inviting atmosphere.

steps.title: Dessert Walk
steps.desc: Stroll to Insomnia Cookies or La Bamba for post-dinner treats.

title: Brandywine Valley Art Day
desc: A day exploring the incredible art and gardens of the Brandywine Valley.

steps.title: Brandywine River Museum
steps.desc: Start with the Wyeth family collection and American illustration masterpieces in a gorgeous converted mill.

steps.title: Lunch at Terrain Cafe
steps.desc: Stunning farm-to-table restaurant inside a garden center. The ambiance alone is worth it.

steps.title: Longwood Gardens
steps.desc: Spend the afternoon exploring 1,100 acres of world-class gardens, conservatories, and the fountain show.

title: Craft Beer Crawl
desc: Hit West Chester's best breweries and beer spots — all walkable in downtown.

steps.title: Start at Sterling Pig
steps.desc: Award-winning brewery with a great tap list and solid pub food.

steps.title: Iron Hill Brewery
steps.desc: The OG West Chester brewpub. Try a flight of their rotating seasonal beers.

steps.title: Artillery Brewing
steps.desc: Laid-back taproom with unique small-batch brews and a good vibe.

steps.title: Finish at Bierhaul
steps.desc: German-inspired beer hall with pretzels, brats, and an impressive draft list.

title: Family Fun Day
desc: A full day of kid-friendly activities around West Chester.

steps.title: Everhart Park
steps.desc: Start with the playground, open fields, and walking paths. Pack some snacks.

steps.title: American Helicopter Museum
steps.desc: Kids love the 35+ helicopters and interactive exhibits. Helicopter rides available seasonally!

steps.title: Lunch at Mas Mexicali
steps.desc: Family-friendly with a fun atmosphere, great tacos, and a kids menu.

steps.title: West Chester Railroad
steps.desc: Wrap up with a 90-minute scenic train ride through the Chester County countryside.

title: Dog Walk & Brunch
desc: A perfect morning with your pup — trails, outdoor dining, and good vibes.

steps.title: Hike Stroud Preserve
steps.desc: 940 acres of dog-friendly trails through meadows and forests. Leash required.

steps.title: Brunch at Stove & Tap
steps.desc: Head to Stove & Tap for their excellent brunch menu. Outdoor patio seating is dog-friendly.

title: Girls' Day Out
desc: Shopping, wine, and a great dinner — the perfect WC ladies' day.

steps.title: Downtown Boutique Shopping
steps.desc: Browse the unique boutiques along Gay Street and Church Street.

steps.title: Wine Tasting at Chadds Ford
steps.desc: Drive 10 minutes to Chadds Ford Winery for a tasting in the barn.

steps.title: Dinner at Mercato
steps.desc: End the day with handmade pasta and Italian wines at Mercato Ristorante.

title: History Buff Day
desc: Explore centuries of American history in the Brandywine Valley.

steps.title: Chester County History Center
steps.desc: Start downtown with interactive exhibits on Chester County's colonial and industrial past.

steps.title: Lunch at Pietro's Prime
steps.desc: Classic steakhouse lunch in a beautifully restored historic building.

steps.title: Hagley Museum
steps.desc: Explore the original DuPont gunpowder works, workers' village, and du Pont family estate along the Brandywine.

steps.title: Winterthur Estate
steps.desc: End with the premier American decorative arts collection and 1,000 acres of gardens.

title: College Town Night Out
desc: Experience the WCU college-town energy with affordable eats and fun bars.

steps.title: Tacos at La Bamba
steps.desc: Cheap, delicious BYOB Mexican — a West Chester institution.

steps.title: Drinks at Kildare's
steps.desc: Classic Irish pub with a great atmosphere, live music, and a rooftop deck.

steps.title: Late Night at Side Bar
steps.desc: Good music, good drinks, and a lively late-night crowd.
